description: Optimize the Dockerfile at /home/ga/build-project/Dockerfile to fix cache-busting anti-patterns so that source code changes do not invalidate the dependency installation cache for system or Python packages. Create a .dockerignore file to exclude unnecessary files like .git and __pycache__ from the build context. Build the optimized image tagged as 'build-project:optimized' and ensure it runs correctly on port 5000. The current build takes too long on every code change; you must optimize the layering order to improve build performance.
